auth.tagline: Pay and receive in Bitcoin. That's it.
auth.useDeviceSecurity: Use your device security to access your wallet

receive.title: Receive
receive.createInvoiceForQr: Create an invoice to generate QR code

pay.title: Pay
pay.clipboardAccessDenied: Could not read clipboard. Please allow clipboard access.
pay.cameraNotSupported: Camera is not supported in this browser
pay.cameraAccessDenied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
pay.noCameraFound: No camera found on this device.

payConfirm.title: Confirm payment
payConfirm.noPaymentData: No payment data. Please scan a QR code first.

accountSetup.title: Setting up your account...
accountSetup.pleaseWait: Please wait while we create your Starknet account

app.description: BIM is a digital wallet application that allows you to pay and receive in Bitcoin using the Lightning Network and Starknet.

swaps.title: Swaps
swaps.swapsWillAppear: Swaps will appear here when you send or receive payments via Lightning or Bitcoin networks.

gasTank.title: Gas Tank
gasTank.description: Bitcoin receive operations require a small STRK deposit as collateral. This deposit is automatically returned when the operation completes or expires. The STRK shown here is your operational reserve — it is never spent, only temporarily locked.
gasTank.empty: No STRK balance. STRK will be provisioned automatically when needed for Bitcoin receive operations.

empty.title: Start using BIM for your payments:
empty.step2: 2. Then pay it from another wallet you have:

notifications.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters

errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.CHALLENGE_EXPIRED: Authentication challenge has expired. Please try again.
errors.CHALLENGE_ALREADY_USED: Authentication challenge has already been used.
errors.INVALID_CHALLENGE: Invalid authentication challenge. Please try again.
errors.SESSION_NOT_FOUND: Session not found. Please sign in.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.SAME_ADDRESS_PAYMENT: Cannot send to your own address.
errors.LIGHTNING_INVOICE_EXPIRED: Lightning invoice has expired. Please generate a new one.
errors.BITCOIN_ADDRESS_NETWORK_MISMATCH: This Bitcoin address is for {{actualNetwork}}. Please use a {{expectedNetwork}} address.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_WITH_AMOUNT: Insufficient balance. This operation requires {{amount}} STRK.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_SECURITY_DEPOSIT: Insufficient balance to cover the security deposit (~{{amount}} {{token}}). Fund your account before retrying.
errors.PAYMASTER_SERVICE_ERROR: Payment service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact support with code PAYMASTER_SERVICE_ERROR.
errors.TIMEOUT_ERROR: Request timed out. Please try again.
